data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Offloads Uipath, Prime Medicine, And Repare Therapeutics
data.description: On April 11th, 2025, Cathie Wood's Ark Invest sold shares in UiPath, Prime Medicine, and Repare Therapeutics, with notable gains and losses.

data.title: GM Halts Electric Van Production In Ontario Amid Sluggish Sales: 1,200 Employees Affected
data.description: General Motors pauses production of its electric vans in Ontario due to slow sales, affecting 1,200 workers.

data.title: Trump And Xi Jinping's Tariff Threats May Be 'Just For The LOLz,' Says Analyst: 'It's Not Like This Is A Great Financial Crisis'
data.description: Amid escalating U.S.-China tariff threats, BCA Research's Marko Papic says the rhetoric may be largely performative "for the LOLz."

data.title: Trump Tariff Wars: China's New Rule To Exempt Nvidia, Qualcomm And Others From Levies, But These Chip Companies Will Be Hit With 125% Tariffs
data.description: China's new chip origin rule spares U.S. designers like Nvidia, AMD, and Qualcomm from 125% tariffs by exempting Taiwan-fabricated chips, while penalizing U.S.-based manufacturers like Intel, GlobalFoundries, and Texas Instruments, reshaping the global semiconductor supply chain.

data.title: RFK Jr Asks If Taxpayer-Funded Healthcare Should Be Accessible To People Smoking 'Three Packs A Day'
data.description: RFK Jr. questions if society should cover healthcare costs for unhealthy habits, sparking debate. Experts worry about limiting access based on behavior.
